untranslatable_reason: This is a philosophy statement about setting profit targets before entry. It describes a mindset/planning principle ('having an approximate profit objective provides edge') rather than a specific position sizing rule with quantifiable parameters. The parameters provided (profit_target_multiplier 1.0x-1.5x volatility, holding_period 1-5 days) are entry/exit conditions and trade characteristics, not sizing mechanics. No position size adjustment rule is defined.
